prestazioni: Engine: EA888 Gen3 2.0L TSI (CUPRA-specific *DKZA* code) – Full hybrid turbo upgrade to a *Garrett GTX3582R Gen II* with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and *TurboSmart 45mm Hyper-Gate* wastegate for 400+ HP on 98 RON fuel with *APR Stage 3+ ECU/TCU flash* (optimized for Cupra’s DQ381 7-speed DSG with *South Bend Stage 3+ clutch kit*).

Suspension: *Ohlins Road & Track DFV* coilovers with Cupra Ateca-specific valving, *034 Motorsport subframe collars*, and *SuperPro 8036K* poly bushings for front control arms to eliminate torque steer under hard launches.

Exhaust: *Milltek Sport* 76mm non-resonated cat-back system with *Cupra-specific downpipe* featuring a *GESI 200-cell high-flow sports cat* (compliant with Euro 6d-TEMP) and *Akrapovič titanium exhaust tips* for weight reduction and aggressive 3,500–6,000 RPM rasp.
estetica: Aero: *Porsche Design Cupra Ateca LE* carbon fiber front splitter (OEM+ but with *Rocket Bunny-style extended side skirts* in raw carbon), *Maxton Design GT rear diffuser* with integrated *Audi RS3-style dual exhaust cutouts*, and *Cupra Performance* carbon fiber mirror caps (painted in *Petrol Blue* to match LE trim).

Wheels: *BBS FI-R* 9.5x20 ET45 in *Gloss Black* with *Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R* 255/30 R20 tires (stretched for aggressive fitment), paired with *H&R TRAK+* 20mm spacers for flush stance and *Project Kics R40* titanium lug bolts.

Interior: *Recaro Sportster CS* front seats with *Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses* (mounted to *Cupra-specific bolt-in harness bar* by *Custom Cages*), *Momo Mod.73* steering wheel with *Cupra Performance* Alcantara, and *AEM CD-7* dash display replacing the infotainment for real-time boost/AFR data.
